unit.note: client full vitest 1575/1575 (incl. new scroll-repaint.test.ts, 8 cases) + tsc --noEmit clean + oxlint clean (touched files warning-free). Client-only change; server suite not in scope.

e2e.note: GPU WebGL rendering artifact (table scroll smear) is not reproducible headless (no real WebGL context in jsdom/Playwright SwiftShader); scroll->full-refresh wiring covered by unit tests. Manual visual verification post-deploy by user.

surface_verification.justification: Pure client-side WebGL rendering fix (terminal scroll repaint). The smear is a GPU-renderer artifact not reproducible in headless/jsdom (no real WebGL context); confirmation requires manual visual judgment in a real browser. The scroll-input -> full term.refresh(0,rows-1) wiring is covered by 8 unit tests (scroll-repaint.test.ts) + the EmbeddedTerminal mount-effect suite; client vitest 1575/1575 green. User verifies visually post-deploy.

test_completeness.enumeration_basis: Behaviors introduced by attachScrollRepaint (scroll-repaint.ts) and its EmbeddedTerminal mount-effect wiring.

behaviors.evidence: scroll-repaint.test.ts: 'firing onScroll schedules a FULL-viewport refresh'

behaviors.behavior: raw wheel event triggers a full refresh (alt-buffer path)
behaviors.evidence: scroll-repaint.test.ts: 'a raw wheel event ... triggers a full refresh'

behaviors.behavior: multiple triggers within one frame coalesce to a single refresh
behaviors.evidence: scroll-repaint.test.ts: 'coalesces multiple triggers within one frame'

behaviors.behavior: trailing-debounced refresh fires after scroll settles (async alt-buffer redraw)
no refresh once the terminal is disposed
behaviors.evidence: scroll-repaint.test.ts: 'never refreshes once the terminal is disposed'

behaviors.behavior: disposer removes wheel listener, disposes onScroll, cancels pending work
refresh throw from a mid-dispose terminal is swallowed
wiring attaches in EmbeddedTerminal mount-effect and disposes on unmount without crashing
behaviors.evidence: EmbeddedTerminal.test.tsx full suite green after onScroll mock added

behaviors.behavior: actual GPU smear elimination on real WebGL render
